findings.text: No Tesseract OCR tool is configured or available in this harness. The task cannot be executed as specified.
Existing extraction for both sources uses pdf_text method with confidence 0.85 and complete coverage.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## OCR Comparison Report (Candidate)

**Task:** task-ocr-both-tesseract-compare
**Sources:** NAP-SRC-0053, NAP-SRC-0055

### Status
Tesseract OCR was not performed because the Tesseract tool is not configured in this harness. The existing pdf_text extraction (confidence 0.85, coverage complete) is available for both sources.

### Recommendation
Once Tesseract is configured, run OCR on both PDFs and compare output with the existing extraction to assess improvement in text quality and coverage.
proposed_artifacts.title: OCR Comparison Report

proposed_tasks.instructions: Configure Tesseract OCR tool in the harness, then run OCR on source PDFs NAP-SRC-0053 and NAP-SRC-0055. Compare the resulting text with the existing pdf_text extraction (art-extracted-NAP-SRC-0053 and art-extracted-NAP-SRC-0055). Report any differences in text quality, coverage, or confidence.
proposed_tasks.title: Run Tesseract OCR on NAP-SRC-0053 and NAP-SRC-0055

summary: Task requested Tesseract OCR on NAP-SRC-0053 and NAP-SRC-0055 and comparison with existing pdf_text extraction. No Tesseract tool is configured or available in this harness. The existing extraction (pdf_text) appears complete and well-structured for both sources. A follow-up task is proposed to perform Tesseract OCR once the tool is available.

uncertainties.text: Whether Tesseract OCR would yield higher confidence or capture additional text not present in the pdf_text extraction is unknown without the tool.
